source_text: Chemical Papers 0.026 to 0.070 µmol/mL for fungal strains, respectively • Overall, nitro and pyridinyl containing derivatives exhib- (Table 2). Analysis of the antimicrobial activity result from ited better antimicrobial potential among the synthesized Table 3 showed that compound 5r showed excellent activity compounds. against bacteria, i.e. S. aureus (MIC = 0.013 µmol/mL), E. coli and S. epidermidis (MIC = 0.026 µmol/mL) and com- pound 5o showed good activity against bacteria, i.e. E. coli and S. epidermidis (MIC = 0.030 µmol/mL) as compared to α‑Glucosidase inhibition reference drug Norfloxacin. Compound 5r was found to pos- sess promising activity against A. niger and C. albicans with The newly synthesized compounds were evaluated MIC value of 0.0260 µmol/mL as compared to reference for in vitro inhibition of α-glucosidase using Acar- drug Fluconazole. bose as a standard drug. The IC values of compounds 50 are presented in Table 4.
